stories.headline: Iran emergency workers search for survivors after deadly US-Israel attacks
stories.description: Latest victims include six people killed in Qom as Iran announces grim milestone of nearly 2,000 war dead.

stories.headline: Two hereditary peers allowed to keep ceremonial roles
stories.description: The Duke of Norfolk and Lord Carrington won the concession due to their role in organising state occasions.

stories.headline: How extensive is Russia’s military aid to Iran?
stories.description: Russia has long exchanged weapons with Iran and is likely offering satellite support, but lacks the will to do much more

stories.headline: Now in power, Nepal’s rapper-politician Balen Shah faces new challenge
stories.description: Shah was a rebel — crude and different from the politicians who previously led Nepal. How will he be in office?

stories.headline: Israeli opposition leader rails against ‘multi-front war without strategy’
stories.description: Yair Lapid says military ‘is stretched to the limit and beyond’ as Israeli forces wage attacks on Iran and Lebanon.
